* **IMMZD2DTMalariaElements**

## Library: IMMZD2DTMalariaElements 

| | |
| :--- | :--- |
| *Official URL*:http://smart.who.int/immunizations/Library/IMMZD2DTMalariaElements | *Version*:0.2.0 |
| Draft as of 2026-03-25 | *Computable Name*:IMMZD2DTMalariaElements |

 
This library defines context-independent elements for Malaria used throughout the Immunization CPG
